calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On June 3, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret DelCoto.
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence adn plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendant Ilya Rosenthal.
Principal of $18,494.80
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $266.00
Interest of $1,118.26 For the total of $22,379.06
Does 1-10 are dismissed on May 19, 2003.
Judgment signed in open court.
